notes: Teacher observation: old play used an existing model and blue marker vanished too quickly, often touching with one gripper finger instead of centering. Codex adjustment: train with smaller visual blue marker, 5 blue guide steps, 0.035m step radius, and 4-frame hold gate before each marker advance. Result: first too-strict 0.018m/8-frame attempt was stopped because moving_pregrasp_final_rate stayed near zero. Relaxed run produced moving guide signal; best checkpoint model_2100 has moving_pregrasp_final_rate 0.019 and stage3_latched 0.892, while live mid-run peaks reached about 0.10 moving final. Strict success is still low, so next step is to increase guided-step reward or use a two-phase schedule before tightening radius.
